title: dolichos grandis
intro: Dolichos grandis, also known as horse gram, is a type of legume native to India and other parts of Asia. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries in traditional Ayurvedic medicine due to its various health benefits and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, and has been found to have anti-inflammatory, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer properties. Dolichos grandis can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or capsule, and is often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, high blood pressure, and obesity.
